title: fix(ui): compact oversized project and cancellation dropdowns
active_goal: Autonomously complete AI Worker Platform GitHub Issue #21 by verifying PR #22 is merged in origin/main, then executing bounded continuation steps in the fix/compact-ui-dropdowns worktree under the master automation prompt until a single draft PR is ready.

evidence: git pull --ff-only origin main fast-forwarded local main to e236580
git log -1 --oneline returned feat(llm): add Agnes provider and reliable Re-Ask composer (#22)
git log origin/main --oneline --grep="Agnes provider" -20 returned e236580 feat(llm): add Agnes provider and reliable Re-Ask composer (#22)
gh pr view 22 confirmed state=MERGED, baseRefName=main, mergeCommit=e2365800ec5a45638bc6d92ba15893b8e23c367d, mergedAt=2026-06-30T16:32:39Z

notes: Selector sits beside compact segmented controls in the Launch Configuration card.
Current shared input class is full-width and does not impose compact select-specific sizing or text truncation.
Selector appears in the Stop Job flow and shares the same input class as the General Item project selector.
Its selected value needs compact sizing without changing the cancellation payload or option values.
Nearby workbench controls already use dense spacing through cockpit-field-group and compact-segmented.
A focused frontend style adjustment is likely sufficient if it preserves width behavior and long-value truncation.

bounded_steps.name: initialize_mission_and_capture_dropdown_discovery
notes: Created the Issue #21 worktree from verified origin/main on fix/compact-ui-dropdowns.
Located both dropdown implementations and documented the first implementation hypothesis without editing frontend behavior yet.

bounded_steps.name: implement_compact_dropdown_hook_and_styles
notes: Added the opt-in compact-inline-select class to the RAN General Item project selector and the cancellation-reason selector in frontend/src/views/HomeView.vue.
Added narrow compact select styling in frontend/src/styles.css without changing the shared cockpit-sites-input behavior for unrelated controls.
Added a focused HomeView regression test to prove the Issue #21 class hook is wired only to the two target selects and verified the full HomeView spec file passes.

bounded_steps.name: run_full_validation_and_partial_browser_uat
notes: Required local frontend validation passed: frontend test, frontend build, frontend smoke, git diff --check, and submodule status review.
Browser verification confirmed the current worktree frontend and backend load on ports 3000 and 8000 without overlays or console errors.
Live browser metrics confirmed the RAN General Item selector renders with the compact-inline-select class at compact dimensions and without page-level horizontal overflow.
MW and RAN Job Detail routes loaded normally in the browser.

Full browser UAT remains incomplete because the live RAN project catalog endpoint fails with RAN_PROJECT_WORKBOOK_MISSING and no active job was available in the current browser-tab session to expose the real cancellation selector.
